item.title: He’s Mega Stuck! Dougo!!
item.description: Watch as Dougo gets completely stuck in a tough spot. See the struggle, attempts to free him, and the fun chaos that follows.

media:content.media:title: He’s Mega Stuck! Dougo!!
media:content.media:description: Watch as Dougo gets completely stuck in a tough spot. See the struggle, attempts to free him, and the fun chaos that follows.

item.title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
item.description: Trying to get a snow blower running after running out of fuel. See if adding just 2 gallons is enough to power through and clear the snow.

media:content.media:title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
media:content.media:description: Trying to get a snow blower running after running out of fuel. See if adding just 2 gallons is enough to power through and clear the snow.

item.title: Last Video of the 4640 Before Sale
item.description: Watch the final moments of the 4640 tractor before it’s sold. A nostalgic look at its performance and memories on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Last Video of the 4640 Before Sale
media:content.media:description: Watch the final moments of the 4640 tractor before it’s sold. A nostalgic look at its performance and memories on the farm.

item.title: Dang, Kids Never Listen!
item.description: A funny and relatable moment showing kids ignoring instructions. Watch the chaos and humor that unfolds when advice goes unheeded.

media:content.media:title: Dang, Kids Never Listen!
media:content.media:description: A funny and relatable moment showing kids ignoring instructions. Watch the chaos and humor that unfolds when advice goes unheeded.

item.title: Snow Storm Projects
item.description: See the creative and practical projects tackled during a snowstorm. From snow removal to cozy indoor tasks, discover how to stay productive in winter weather.

media:content.media:title: Snow Storm Projects
media:content.media:description: See the creative and practical projects tackled during a snowstorm. From snow removal to cozy indoor tasks, discover how to stay productive in winter weather.

item.title: How Dougo Treats His Equipment
item.description: See how Dougo maintains and handles his equipment with care. Tips and techniques for keeping machinery in top condition on the farm.

media:content.media:title: How Dougo Treats His Equipment
media:content.media:description: See how Dougo maintains and handles his equipment with care. Tips and techniques for keeping machinery in top condition on the farm.

item.title: Custom Combining – Was It Fun?
item.description: Watch the ups and downs of custom combining. See the challenges, surprises, and excitement of working with different fields and equipment.

media:content.media:title: Custom Combining – Was It Fun?
media:content.media:description: Watch the ups and downs of custom combining. See the challenges, surprises, and excitement of working with different fields and equipment.

item.title: Buried by Snow and 50 MPH Winds
item.description: Experience the struggle as 3 inches of snow and 50 mph winds trap us. See how we navigate extreme winter conditions on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Buried by Snow and 50 MPH Winds
media:content.media:description: Experience the struggle as 3 inches of snow and 50 mph winds trap us. See how we navigate extreme winter conditions on the farm.

item.title: Preparing 3 Diggers for Spring
item.description: Watch as we get three diggers ready for spring work. Maintenance, checks, and prep ensure the machines are set for a productive season.

media:content.media:title: Preparing 3 Diggers for Spring
media:content.media:description: Watch as we get three diggers ready for spring work. Maintenance, checks, and prep ensure the machines are set for a productive season.
